description: Public reference-data source registry for QS-DMSS provenance and calibration sandbox workflows. These records identify official public source lanes; they do not bundle or mirror provider datasets.

sources.name: Planck Legacy Archive
sources.citation: Planck Collaboration. Planck 2018 results. VI. Cosmological parameters. Astronomy & Astrophysics 641, A6 (2020).
sources.license_or_terms: Use according to ESA/Planck archive citation and data-use guidance.
sources.cache_policy: Do not bundle Planck products in qs-dmss. Cache user-selected files locally with URL, access date, checksum, and citation metadata.
notes: Useful as a public cosmology reference lane for provenance and calibration-sandbox experiments.
QS-DMSS does not claim physical calibration to Planck data without independent domain validation.

sources.name: DESI Data Release 1
sources.citation: DESI Collaboration et al. Data Release 1 of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument. The Astronomical Journal 171, 285 (2026).
sources.license_or_terms: Use according to DESI public data-release citation and data-use guidance.
sources.cache_policy: Do not bundle DESI products in qs-dmss. Cache user-selected files locally with URL, access date, checksum, and citation metadata.
notes: Useful as a public large-scale-structure reference lane.
QS-DMSS source records are metadata references, not a DESI mirror.

sources.name: Sloan Digital Sky Survey Data Release 19
sources.domain: Public survey spectra, catalogs, and value-added products
sources.citation: SDSS Collaboration et al. The Nineteenth Data Release of the Sloan Digital Sky Survey. arXiv:2507.07093 (2025).
sources.license_or_terms: Use according to SDSS public data-release citation and data-use guidance.
sources.cache_policy: Do not bundle SDSS products in qs-dmss. Cache user-selected files locally with URL, access date, checksum, and citation metadata.
notes: Useful as a public survey reference lane for reviewer-facing provenance examples.
QS-DMSS does not treat SDSS data-release presence as scientific validation.

sources.name: Gaia Data Release 3
sources.domain: Astrometric, photometric, spectroscopic, and astrophysical-parameter catalog data
sources.citation: Gaia Collaboration. Gaia Data Release 3: Summary of the content and survey properties. Astronomy & Astrophysics 674, A1 (2023).
sources.license_or_terms: Use according to ESA/Gaia archive citation and data-use guidance.
sources.cache_policy: Do not bundle Gaia products in qs-dmss. Cache user-selected files locally with URL, access date, checksum, and citation metadata.
notes: Useful as a public catalog reference lane for provenance workflow tests.
QS-DMSS source records are metadata references, not a Gaia mirror.
